title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India!
